sevenDay.synopsis: No problems today as VFR conditions are dominating the LFA. This trend will continue thru the rest of the week, with some cigs and fog setting up for the weekend. Speaking of the weekend, our rain chances will ramp up, especially Saturday as some upper level energy moves across the area. Showers, maybe even a rumble or two of thunder, are possible. And spoiler alert: next week looks active with the chance of precip each day.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 21 APR - 27 APR
